  1. PowerBi
  2. Workforce Analytics Dashboard

Workforce Analytics Dashboard

Project Overview

This project analyses workforce trends including:

  • Headcount growth

  • Attrition and retention

  • Tenure and knowledge risk

  • Pay and workforce investment

🖥️ Dashboard Preview

Previewing data between 2010-25

Previewing data between 2023-24

🔍 Key Insights

  • Attrition rate remains elevated at ~23%, indicating retention risk
  • Mid-level and senior roles present the highest continuity risk
  • Workforce growth has stabilised despite ongoing hiring

🛠️ Tools Used

  • Power BI
  • DAX
  • Data modelling
